_schema.description: Allowlist for B18 money math audit (scripts/audit-money-math.mjs). Each entry documents a known location where raw arithmetic on a money-typed value is acceptable. New entries require owner + expires + reason. Baseline entries (added on first audit run) expire 90 days out and must be migrated per docs/audits/MONEY_CENTS_AUDIT_2026-05-01.md.

fields.file: Path relative to repo root, e.g. src/lib/foo.ts
fields.line: 1-indexed line number where the violation occurs
fields.reason: Why this exception is acceptable; reference the migration plan if applicable
fields.expires: ISO date after which the entry no longer suppresses the violation

entries.reason: BASELINE — pre-existing at allowlist creation; migrate per MONEY_CENTS_AUDIT_2026-05-01.md
